title: corycium deflexum
intro: Corycium deflexum, also known as the flexible club moss, is a type of plant belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corycium deflexum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. In herbal preparations, Corycium deflexum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
